//: Watchlist seed populated on host startup via WatchlistSeedService. Each entry is upserted as TrackedPlayer with WatchlistSource = Seed. PlayerId is the FUT.GG eaId (see docs/source-futgg-market.md and docs/watchlist.md). Operators can extend this file or use POST /api/watchlist instead of editing the file. Path is configurable via Watchlist:CatalogSeedPath (default: data/players-catalog.seed.json relative to the host content root).
